Defendant Walsh Construction Companys Joinder To Motion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages Phases Of Trial

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S Joinder To Motion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages Phases Of Trial.

Defendant Walsh Construction Company's motion to bifurcate trial is denied without prejudice; our court's practice is to defer to the trial judge on such motions.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
